SZX.notes: 28km road via Shennan Ave/G107; ~45 km/h effective in Shenzhen traffic.

HKG.mode: Didi to Shekou Ferry Terminal + cross-boundary ferry
HKG.notes: 5min Didi to Shekou pier + 30min pre-board + 35min ferry to HKG. Best option from Shekou.

CAN.notes: ~145km road: 30min Shenzhen urban exit + 70min G4 highway + 25min airport approach.

NUE.mode: Taxi or own car via A73/B8
NUE.notes: 32km rural road via B8 then Autobahn spur; 35-45min. Taxi ~€50, own car much cheaper.

MUC.notes: 178km Autobahn (A9 south then A92 east to airport); 100min highway + 15min rural exit. Train via Nürnberg+Munich Hbf takes 2h30+ — not practical.

FRA.mode: Taxi to Erlangen Bf + RE to Nürnberg + ICE to Frankfurt Airport Fbf
FRA.notes: 15min taxi to Erlangen Bf (€15) + 20min RE to Nürnberg + 20min transfer + 80min ICE to Frankfurt Flughafen Fernbahnhof (€58 Sparpreis).
